[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101001 3
1 100100101 4
2 101100110 5
3 100111111 7
4 111101111 8
5 101111111 8
6 110001111 6
7 101111111 8

12 21 101111110 7
23 32 110111111 8

67 76 000111111 6
70 07 100101101 5
